chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Civil Transfer Application No. 22 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on CMA No. 2184/2024 (Urgent) 2. For hearing of Main Case 21.03.2025 Mr. Ali Azam, Advocate for the Applicant..-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. The instant Civil Transfer Application has been moved by the Applicant under Section 24 CPC R/W Section 25-A (2A) of West Pakistan Family Courts Act 1964. Learned counsel for the Applicant has drawn my attention to the first Civil Transfer Application bearing No.15/2024 filed before this Court by the Applicant which was disposed of vide order dated 04.03.2024. In the said order it was noted that no plausible ground has been raised by the Applicant and in fact directions have already been passed to the trial Court which is seized of the matter to decide the case preferably within two months. Learned counsel contended that no such direction has been followed by the trial Court. Ironically, he has attached an application for adjournment which was been moved by the Applicant on which order dated 15.03.2025 was passed by the Trial Court. Be that as it may, I find no merits in the present Civil Transfer Application and the same is hereby dismissed in limine with no order as to cost. Trial court is directed to adhere to the timeline given by this Court in the order dated 04.03.2024 passed in Civil Transfer Application No.15/2024. JUDGE Nadeem Qureshi “PA”
